contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 95
- Description: Security dashboard: dynamic domain discovery, hosting classification, score + nav
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/Cypher-Defense/pull/35
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/Cypher-Defense/pull/36
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/Cypher-Defense/pull/32
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/176
  
  Details:
  Made the web security scan fully dynamic — domains come from Route53 (no hardcoded list; zones via env, default the DAO domains) and GitHub Pages IP ranges are fetched live from api.github.com/meta instead of being hardcoded. Each domain is classified by what it points to (GitHub Pages / EC2 / CloudFront / external) and shown in a new Hosting column. Recalibrated the score with per-category caps so it reflects real posture without bottoming out, and collapsed per-repo GitHub findings into category counts so the deductions panel stays readable. Coverage went from 8 to 22 domains incl all beta subdomains; current score 25/D surfaces real issues (world-open AWS ports, two TLS cert hostname mismatches, missing headers, no branch protection, secret scanning disabled). Also added a Security Dashboard button to the landing hero + revised the EC2 security-group remediation plan to drop SSM/CIDR per operator (keep SSH/Monit open with key auth, focus on locking down data ports).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 158.33
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
